title: Tencent WorkBuddy's Monthly Visits Exceed 20 Million in June, Leading the AI Office Intelligent Agent Market
excerpt: The newly released "2026 Q2 China Office AI Agent Platform Market Insight Report" shows that Tencent's WorkBuddy maintains a leading position in the domestic PC
content_html:
The newly released "2026 Q2 China Office AI Agent Platform Market Insight Report" shows that Tencent's WorkBuddy maintains a leading position in the domestic PC-based AI-native office AI agent market, with a monthly visit count of 20.97 million in June 2026, exceeding the combined total of the second and third places.

The report indicates that the total number of visits in the Chinese PC-based AI-native office AI agent market reached over 60 million in June, showing continued industry growth. Tencent's AI programming agent CodeBuddy also remains in a top position.

As an AI efficiency office intelligent agent, WorkBuddy allows users to complete task planning, file processing, and result delivery through natural language instructions, and can be used on multiple platforms including PC, WeChat mini program, and App.

Since its release in March 2026, WorkBuddy has continuously been upgraded, integrating mainstream large models such as HuanYuan, DeepSeek, Zhipu GLM, and Kimi. It has launched features such as Skill Center, Expert Mode, Automated Tasks, and a Knowledge Base. It also supports connections through WeChat and Enterprise WeChat, and has passed the trusted certification by the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology.

As AI agents gradually shift from content generation to task execution, the office sector has become an important scenario for large model applications. The growth of WorkBuddy also reflects the rapid increase in market demand for AI-native productivity tools.

content_html_zh:
最新发布的《2026Q2中国办公人工智能座席平台市场洞察报告》显示，腾讯WorkBuddy在国内PC端AI原生办公人工智能座席市场保持领先地位，2026年6月月访问量达2097万，超过第二名和第三名的总和。

报告显示，6月份中国PC端AI原生办公AI座席市场总访问量突破6000万，行业持续增长。 腾讯的人工智能编程代理CodeBuddy也保持在榜首位置。

WorkBuddy作为AI效率办公智能代理，允许用户通过自然语言指令完成任务规划、文件处理和结果传递，可在PC、微信小程序、App等多个平台使用。

自2026年3月发布以来，WorkBuddy不断升级，集成了HuanYuan、DeepSeek、Zhipu GLM、Kimi等主流大型模型。 它推出了技能中心、专家模式、自动化任务和知识库等功能。 还支持微信、企业微信连接，并通过中国信息通信研究院可信认证。

随着AI智能体逐渐从内容生成转向任务执行，办公领域成为大型模型应用的重要场景。 WorkBuddy的增长也反映出市场对AI原生生产力工具需求的快速增长。
